{"problem_standardized_math":"Consider the linear program\n\\[\n\\begin{aligned}\n\\min\\quad & -5x_1-x_2 \\\\\n\\text{subject to}\\quad & x_1+x_2 \\le 5, \\\\\n& 2x_1+\\tfrac{1}{2}x_2 \\le 8, \\\\\n& x \\ge 0.\n\\end{aligned}\n\\]\nUsing Procedure 13.1, solve this problem by the simplex method. At each step, display the basis and the vectors \\(\\lambda\\), \\(s_N\\), and \\(x_B\\), together with the value of the objective function. The initial choice of \\(\\mathcal{B}\\) for which \\(x_B \\ge 0\\) should be evident after the slack variables have been added in part (a)."}
